title: Harpic Hygienic Fresh Sticker Adhesive Toilet Block, Pine, Pack 1 x 4 Stickers, Toilet Freshener, No Plastic Applicator, Up to 8 weeks of Freshness
features: LONG LASTING FRAGRANCE: Each toilet block provides up to 2 weeks of freshness. A boost of scent with every flush.
HYGIENIC: No germy cage in your toilet - no need to remove a dirty cage after the product is finished as Harpic Hygienic & Fresh Sticker dissolves.
EASY TO USE: Apply on clean, wet surface just under the rim push onto the bowl and you’re ready to go in 3 seconds!
NO PLASTIC APPLICATOR: 99% less plastic* *Compared with Harpic rim blocks
DISCREET: Sticks discreetly to the bowl.
description: Product Description HARPIC PINE HYGIENIC & FRESH STICKER is a convenient self sticking adhesive toilet block that sits discreetly inside the toilet bowl, giving lasting freshness without the need for a plastic cage! It can be applied in 3 seconds without the use of any plastic applicators, and each colourful block dissolves slowly with each flush while giving up to 2 weeks of fresh fragrance. The HARPIC PINE HYGIENIC & FRESH STICKER is specially designed to freshen your clean toilet. A new & innovative sticker, not a toilet disc. Ingredients Contains: Sodium C10-13 AlkylBenzenesulfonate, Sulfuric acid, monoC12-14-alkyl esters, sodium salts, SODIUM CARBONATE, TETRAHYDROLINALOOL, CITRONELLOL, Allyl (3-methylbutoxy) acetate, D_LIMONENE, GERANIOL, 2,4-DIMETHYL3-CYCLOHEXENE - CARBOXALDEHYDE
